caption: Table 103. Document revision history
rows: Updated some power consumptions on cover page. Added Table 4: Functionalities depending on the working mode. Updated Table 34: Current consumption in Stop 2 mode. Updated Table 35: Current consumption in Stop 1 mode. Updated Table 37: Current consumption in Standby mode. Updated Table 66: ADC characteristics. Updated note below Table 30: Typical connection diagram using the ADC.

Added missing LPUART communication interface on cover page. Fixed OPAMP index in Table 3: STM32L462xx modes overview. Replaced RAM2 by SRAM2 in Section 3.9.3: Voltage regulator and Section 3.9.4: Low-power modes. Updated Section 3.7: Boot modes. Added Table 9: DFSDM1 implementation. Updated Table 60: I/O static characteristics. Updated Section 7.2: UFBGA100 package information.

Updated DAC terminology in all the document for clarification: single DAC instance (= DAC1) with 2 output channels. Added ECOPACK2® information in Features. Updated LPUART bullet in Features. Updated Section 3.9.1: Power supply schemes. Added Figure 3: Power-up/down sequence. Added DFSDM1 in Table 5: STM32L462xx peripherals interconnect matrix. Updated Clock-out capability in Section 3.11: Clocks and startup. Updated Figure 4: Clock tree. Updated Section 3.14.1: Nested vectored interrupt controller (NVIC). Removed a footnote in Table 15: STM32L462xx pin definitions. Updated Section 6.3.2: Operating conditions at power- up / power-down. Updated A in Table 25: Embedded internal voltage Coeff reference. Updated Table 40: Peripheral current consumption.
Added Section 6.3.16: Extended interrupt and event controller input (EXTI) characteristics. Updated Table 60: I/O static characteristics. Updated Table 72: DAC characteristics.

Added LQFP48 Package. Updated Energy benchmark. Updated Table 1: STM32L462xx family device features and peripheral counts. Added Figure 11: STM32L462Cx LQFP48 pinout(1). Updated Table 15: STM32L462xx pin definitions. Updated Figure 13: STM32L462xx memory map. Updated Table 22: General operating conditions. Updated Table 49: MSI oscillator characteristics. Updated Section 6.3.14: I/O port characteristics. Updated Table 61: Output voltage characteristics. Updated Figure 36: Quad SPI timing diagram - DDR mode. Updated Table 90: USB electrical characteristics. Updated Section 7: Package information. Added Section 7.6: LQFP48 package information. Updated Table 101: Package thermal characteristics.
